title: Kerala High Court stays removal of Vellapally Natesan as SNDP General Secretary
description: The Kerala High Court on Monday stayed the operation of an order of a single-judge who had directed the removal of Vellapally Natesan and others from his post as General Secretary of Sree Narayana Dharma Paripalana Yogam (SNDP Yogam) [VK Natesan & anr v Dr K Reghu Anchayil & ors].A Division Bench of Chief Justice Soumen Sen and Justice Syam Kumar VM passed the order on appeals filed by Vellappally Natesan, his son Thushar Vellappally, and other SNDP directors challenging the single-judge
